Title: Missing Email Length Validation on Signup
Description: The signup form accepts an extremely long email address (1000+ characters) without any validation error.
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to signup. 2. Enter 1000+ char email. 3. Click Continue.
Actual Result: System accepts and proceeds to OTP step.

Title: Privacy Policy Content Inconsistency (Duplicate Section 1)
Description: The Privacy Policy page contains a numbering error where "Section 1" is repeated for different topics.
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to privacy policy. 2. Check numbering.
Actual Result: Two different sections are labeled as ""1."".

Title: Missing Subscription Confirmation Email
Description: Footer subscription says success but no email is delivered.
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Subscribe in footer. 2. Observe success message. 3. Check inbox.
Actual Result: No email received despite success message.

Title: Redundant AI Copy: "suggestion questions"
Description: Tautological phrasing "suggestion questions" found on AI Interview page.
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to feature/ai-interview. 2. Read configuration copy.

Title: Typo on Case Study Page ("Industires")
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to case-study page. 2. Check category headers.

Title: Conceptual Inconsistency: "ChatGPT Assistance" in Proctoring
Description: Enabling AI assistance during a test contradicts the purpose of proctoring.
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to proctoring settings. 2. Look for assistance toggle.
Expected Result: Proctoring tools should focus on integrity.
Actual Result: Option to enable ChatGPT assistance exists.
